description_en: Chiang Mai may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 19 halal restaurants and 8 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Chiang Mai, Thailand, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Chiang Mai: 36 halal restaurants listed, 8 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
